_note: Pi custom-provider config for the Ikey test gateway. Install to ~/.pi/agent/models.json (merge if you already have other custom providers). The apiKey command reads WORKHORSE_GATEWAY_KEY from deploy/.env at runtime — no hardcoded secret. The absolute path below is machine-specific; update it if the repo moves. scripts/pi-ikey.sh installs this automatically when ~/.pi/agent/models.json is absent.
